name: unity-cli
description: Workflow-oriented Codex skills for Unity Editor automation via the Rust unity-cli.

interface.longDescription: Provides workflow-oriented skills for the Rust unity-cli, covering scene authoring, asset management, C# editing/navigation, prefab workflows, Editor control, Input System, Play Mode testing, UI automation, and Addressables. Skills are shared with the Claude Code plugin via a single source of truth.
